publicationGuardrails: Confirm the current official links still match the website before publishing.
Use Base Mainnet / chainId 8453 and the verified contract address when linking to verification content.
Use the official GCA/USDT route when discussing markets.
Keep the wording factual and project-build focused.
doNotAdd: return promises, price targets, market predictions, or investment advice
third-party audit claim until an independent report is public
BaseScan or security-vendor approval claim unless the platform confirms it
LP lock, reserve lock, buyback, or price-support claim before evidence exists

drafts.visualTheme: Red GCA mark over a Base network grid with a small radar line.
xEnglish: GCA Weekly Go China Radar is our public rhythm for the Go China narrative: market education, risk-first research, and transparent build updates around future China-facing Web3 tools.
Built on Base. Fixed supply. Verify first.
No return promises. Not financial advice.
xChinese: GCA Weekly Go China Radar 是我们的公开内容节奏：围绕 Go China 叙事、市场教育、风险优先研究，以及未来面向中国场景的 Web3 工具建设持续更新。
Base 链上部署。固定供应。先验证，再行动。
不承诺价格结果。非投资建议。
telegram: GCA Weekly Go China Radar is the recurring public format for Go China narrative notes, risk-first research, and transparent build updates.
Verify official links before using any wallet or market interface: https://gcagochina.com/verify.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Research cadence only; no price, return, listing, audit, or approval claim.

drafts.visualTheme: Member access pass, wallet verification check, and credits ledger.
xEnglish: GCA Member Access is being designed around read-only wallet checks, utility credits, and manual review before any benefit record is activated.
The goal is simple: access first, risk control first, no custody.
No public self-service claim is live yet.
xChinese: GCA Member Access 正在围绕只读钱包验证、utility credits 和人工审核流程搭建。
目标很明确：先做访问层，先做风控边界，不托管用户资产。
目前公开自助领取还没有上线。
telegram: GCA Member Access is planned as a verified access workflow, not a custody workflow.
Public self-service claiming is not live until controlled account UI and release gates are complete.
drafts.claimBoundary: Planned utility workflow only; do not claim live self-service claiming.

drafts.visualTheme: Contract address card, Base badge, GCA/USDT route, and verify checklist.
xEnglish: Before interacting with GCA, verify first:
Use official links only. Not financial advice.
xChinese: 使用 GCA 前先验证：
只使用官方链接。非投资建议。
telegram: Verification checklist: Base Mainnet / chainId 8453, GCA contract, official website, official X, official Telegram, and current GCA/USDT route.
Use the verify page before taking any action: https://gcagochina.com/verify.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Verification reminder only; no approval or safety guarantee claim.

drafts.visualTheme: Dashboard modules for liquidation replay, backtest, risk alert, and position sizing.
xEnglish: GCA's product direction is not custody and not a trading promise.
The build path is a risk-first access layer for liquidation replay, backtesting, risk alerts, ENTRY_READY review, and position sizing.
xChinese: GCA 的产品方向不是托管，也不是交易结果承诺。
建设路径是风险优先的访问层：爆仓复盘、回测、风险提醒、ENTRY_READY 复核、仓位计算。
telegram: GCA's utility thesis is a non-custodial, risk-first access layer for research and review tools.
It should not be described as trading permission or a trading result promise.
drafts.claimBoundary: Product direction only; no trading result or custody claim.

drafts.visualTheme: GCA/USDT route card with a visible early-liquidity note.
xEnglish: The current official GCA market route is GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet.
Liquidity is still early-stage, so trades can face high price impact and slippage. Verify the route before using any interface.
No market prediction. Not financial advice.
xChinese: 当前 GCA 官方市场路线是 Base Mainnet 上的 GCA/USDT。
流动性仍处于早期阶段，交易可能出现较高价格影响和滑点。使用任何界面前先核对官方路线。
不做市场预测。非投资建议。
telegram: Official route: GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet.
The market remains early-stage. Users should expect possible price impact and slippage, and should verify the route first.
drafts.claimBoundary: Market route information only; no liquidity-depth, price, or listing claim.

drafts.visualTheme: Fixed supply meter, reserve wallet disclosure, and no-mint label.
xEnglish: Verify the facts. Do not rely on screenshots.
xChinese: 以公开验证信息为准，不要只看截图。
telegram: GCA has a fixed total supply and no post-deployment mint path. The public supply page records the current allocation language and owner reserve disclosure.
Supply page: https://gcagochina.com/supply.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Supply disclosure only; do not overstate circulating supply or reserve lock status.

drafts.visualTheme: Contract controls checklist with an external-audit pending marker.
xEnglish: GCA contract facts are public: fixed supply, verified source, no blacklist, no pause, no transfer tax, and no hidden mint path.
Current boundary: no completed third-party audit yet.
xChinese: GCA 合约信息是公开的：固定供应、源码已验证、无黑名单、无暂停、无转账税、无隐藏增发路径。
当前边界：还没有完成第三方审计。
telegram: GCA publishes contract-control facts publicly, including no blacklist, no pause, no transfer tax, and no hidden mint path.
No completed third-party audit should be claimed until an independent report exists.
drafts.claimBoundary: Contract-control summary only; no third-party audit or security-vendor approval claim.

drafts.visualTheme: Product blueprint for GCA AI Quant Access and release gates.
xEnglish: GCA AI Quant Access is the planned product direction:
read-only wallet checks, member access, utility credits, review queue, and risk-tool modules.
Public self-service flows still depend on release gates.
xChinese: GCA AI Quant Access 是当前规划的产品方向：
只读钱包验证、会员访问、utility credits、审核队列和风险工具模块。
公开自助流程仍需要完成 release gates 后再上线。
telegram: Product direction: GCA AI Quant Access. The buildout is still release-gated, with public self-service flows pending controlled account UI and operational checks.
Product page: https://gcagochina.com/product.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Product roadmap only; do not claim a live self-service product before release gates are complete.

drafts.visualTheme: Official links board for X, Telegram, website, and contract.
xEnglish: If a link does not match the official site, treat it as unverified.
xChinese: 如果链接和官网不一致，就先视为未验证。
telegram: Use only the official GCA links shown on the website. Community moderators should point users to verify.html, community.html, and the official X / Telegram links.
Community kit: https://gcagochina.com/community.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Official-link reminder only; no platform approval or listing claim.

drafts.visualTheme: Monthly build ledger with docs, campaign, member, and risk modules.
xEnglish: Official docs, token verification, GCA/USDT route, campaign calendar, member-access rules, risk boundaries, and public review materials are live.
Next: keep shipping product evidence, not promises.
xChinese: 官方资料、代币验证、GCA/USDT 路线、内容日历、会员规则、风险边界和公开审核材料已经上线。
下一步：继续交付产品证据，而不是口号。
telegram: GCA monthly build recap: public docs, verification, official route, content calendar, member rules, risk pages, and review materials are live.
Announcement hub: https://gcagochina.com/announcements.html
drafts.claimBoundary: Build recap only; do not add external approval, listing, audit, or price claims.
